mapper.insert: INSERT INTO local_message (message_id, exchange, routing_key, message_body, status, retry_count, max_retry, business_type, business_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{exchange}, #{routingKey}, #{messageBody}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetry}, #{businessType}, #{businessId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE local_message SET status = #{status}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, message_id, exchange, routing_key, message_body, status, retry_count, max_retry, next_retry_time, fail_reason, business_type, business_id, create_time, update_time FROM local_message WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED') AND retry_count < max_retry ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 100
